
## General Instructions
This project is a static site generator for a swimming club website.
It needs to be easily maintainable by a small and/or non-technical team, so **minimising complexity and dependencies is a key goal** - ensure to always keep that in mind in all your responses and code suggestions.

## Working with the Project
See [README.md](../README.md) for instructions on how to work with this project, such as technologies used, code structure, coding standards.
Please refer to this and adhere to it when answering questions about the project, and when writing code for the project.
